params.name: Teutonic Knight Emblem
params.description:
On Jul 9, 1190 AD, the Teutonic Knights were founded in Acre of the Kingdom of Jerusalem.
During the Third Crusade, a large number of German knights joined the Crusading army, hoping that Frederick I would lead them to victory. However, Frederick I accidentally drowned in a small river. In Acre, the German knights were leaderless, suffering from heat and disease, so they asked the Pope for approval to become a military order. Finally, the Pope issued a charter, and the Teutonic Knights were e …
